summary: Maeda has decisively turned bullish with his latest video titled 'The Bottom Is In', predicting higher Bitcoin prices ahead.
narrative: He argues that the market is currently bottoming and suggests that STRC could act as a form of leverage to propel BTC to new highs. This view contrasts with his previous stance of shorting Ethereum, as he now dismisses the need for further downside and focuses on accumulation.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
